nasb.text: And the fading flower of its glorious beauty, Which is at the head of the fertile valley, Will be like the first-ripe fig prior to summer, Which one sees, And as soon as it is in his hand, He swallows it.

esv.text: and the fading flower of its glorious beauty, which is on the head of the rich valley, will be like a first-ripe fig before the summer: when someone sees it, he swallows it as soon as it is in his hand.

cnv.text: 它在肥美谷山頂上如將殘的花朵一般的榮美， 必像夏天以前初熟的無花果。 那些看見它的人，都必注意； 一到手裡， 就把它吞吃了。

ccb.text: 那肥美山谷上将残的荣美之花， 必像夏季到来之前早熟的无花果， 人一看见它就把它摘去吞掉。

csbs.text: 在肥沃之谷的山顶上， 荣耀华美的将残之花， 必像夏天之前初熟的无花果； 人看见它，一拿到手中就会吞掉。
